reason: Initial frozen exceptions for files already above the 1500-line source/test cap when the repo-wide size gate was added.

exceptions.reason: Replay workload cleanup lowered the existing oversized harness; keep ratcheting until browser harness reporting is split.
Docs sweep core remains over the cap after renderer extraction; keep ratcheting as follow-up pieces split out.
Existing oversized AI decision test module before repo-wide source-size gate.
Steel rally production reuses the authoritative mining query through an explicit architecture edge; keep ratcheting until archcheck scanners and tests are split into modules.
Observer analysis contract coverage moved beside its DTOs, lowering the existing oversized protocol module; keep ratcheting until remaining protocol DTO groups are split.
Panzerfaust shot persistence adds detached shot-store plumbing to the existing oversized sim combat test harness; keep ratcheting until combat tests are split.

Artillery UX Phase 3 adds server-authoritative Blanket Fire command routing and shared Point/Blanket firing execution to the existing oversized command service; keep ratcheting until artillery command runtime is extracted.
Formation extraction lowered the existing oversized movement coordinator; keep ratcheting until coordinator policy is split.
Existing oversized movement test module before repo-wide source-size gate.
Panzerfaust reload extracted queued attack promotion helpers from the existing oversized order adapter; keep ratcheting until queue validation is fully split.
Game-state Phase 2 routes pathing through the DerivedState shell and exposes internal config preservation for reset; keep ratcheting until pathing diagnostics are split.
Snapshot lifecycle diagnostics added writer serialization/send timing to the existing oversized server shell; keep ratcheting until connection writer handling is split.
Steel rally input coverage extends the existing oversized state/input fixture; keep ratcheting until remaining state/input fixtures are split.
